_comment_followSystemTheme: MUST stay false on teams-for-linux 2.11.x. 2.11.0 (PR #2566) flipped the default to true, which makes the app write followOsTheme=true into Teams' clientPreferences; since this client can't supply a HostTheme value, Teams' GraphQL mutation rejects it and the Dark toggle silently stops working (upstream issue #2662). 2.12.0 (PR #2673) fixes the root cause but keeps the true default, so this explicit opt-out stays correct either way.
